title: Angels in the Outfield
review_summary: A more engaging sequel with superior effects compared to its predecessor; enjoyable by both kids and adults. Tony Danza shines but it's not just about Taxi's cast reunion—Danny Glover delivers strong acting moments, making a worthwhile viewing experience.

title: Life Stinks
review_summary: A light-hearted film perfect after work with its humor about unrealistic situations; recommended despite being extremely silly.

title: Sabrina the Teenage Witch
director: Gary Halvorson, Kenneth R. Koch, Brian K. Roberts, Linda Day, Peter Baldwin, Anson Williams, Melissa Joan Hart, Jeff Melman, David Trainer, Andrew Tsao, Robby Benson, Mark Cendrowski, Sheldon Bull, Beth Broderick, Bill Layton, Gail Mancuso, Chuck Vinson, David Grossman, Henry Winkler, Joyce Gittlin, Leonard R. Garner Jr., Asaad Kelada, Liz Plonka, Kim Friedman, Tibor Takács, Tom Cherones, Dinah Manoff, Amanda Bearse, Scott Marshall, Paul Hoen
review_summary: The reviewer fondly reminisces about their favorite TV show's characters, humorous plots like "Sabrina Through the Looking Glass," and a wish for its return on TGIF, awarding it perfect ten out of ten stars.
